operations.name: get_summary
operations.description: Pull blended performance summary (revenue, spend, ROAS, CAC, LTV)
operations.notes: Blended attribution model includes all paid + organic + email.

operations.name: get_creative_breakdown
operations.description: Pull creative-level performance with attributed orders
operations.notes: Attribution model configured at TW level (default last-click vs custom).

naming_conventions.ad_naming_alignment: Aligned with Meta/TikTok ad naming. TripleWhale parses UTMs to attribute.

known_limitations: Attribution accuracy depends on TripleWhale Pixel install + UTM consistency.
Blended metrics require all paid channels connected to TW.
Cohort analyses limited to TW UI ; API exposes only summarized data.
learned_rules: Cross-check TW spend with native Meta/Google reports (often ~5% delta due to attribution windows).
Use TW for blended view, native platform APIs for granular adset/ad analysis.
Cache responses 1h minimum (TW data updates hourly, not real-time).
